title: About us :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
- How we work Immigration New Zealand is the operational processing arm of New Zealand’s immigration system. Our ambition is to provide a trusted and effective immigration service for all our customers.
Immigration New Zealand is the operational processing arm of New Zealand’s immigration system. Our ambition is to provide a trusted and effective immigration service for all our customers.
- Our strategies and programmes Immigration New Zealand runs a range of programmes, including improving services for customers, helping migrants make New Zealand their home, and stopping immigration fraud and exploitation.

## Our strategies and programmes
Immigration New Zealand runs a range of programmes, including improving services for customers, helping migrants make New Zealand their home, and stopping immigration fraud and exploitation.
- International cooperation We work with different countries and international organisations to improve the delivery of immigration services, resettle refugees and enhance border security.

## International cooperation
We work with different countries and international organisations to improve the delivery of immigration services, resettle refugees and enhance border security.
- Information for industry, embassies and consulates We work with airline carriers, panel physicians and the tourism industry. See our information for these industries below. Embassies and consulates can use our Visa Verification Service to check the status of someone's visa.

## Information for industry, embassies and consulates
We work with airline carriers, panel physicians and the tourism industry. See our information for these industries below. Embassies and consulates can use our Visa Verification Service to check the status of someone's visa.
- Research and statistics We gather data on all people who come to New Zealand. This helps us create immigration and settlement policies and strategies. We also run monthly customer experience surveys.

## Research and statistics
We gather data on all people who come to New Zealand. This helps us create immigration and settlement policies and strategies. We also run monthly customer experience surveys.
- About this site Learn about our site and the toi Māori designs used on it. Find our terms of use for our website and online systems and learn about how we collect and use information.
Learn about our site and the toi Māori designs used on it. Find our terms of use for our website and online systems and learn about how we collect and use information.
- Glossary Terms and definitions of words used on our site, listed alphabetically.
Terms and definitions of words used on our site, listed alphabetically.
- Immigration policy and law Immigration laws and policies set the rules for people who want to visit, work, study, live, start a business, or invest in New Zealand.

## Immigration policy and law
Immigration laws and policies set the rules for people who want to visit, work, study, live, start a business, or invest in New Zealand.
